200.description: The query succeed and the results were returned

count.description: The number of interactions the project(s) that matched the provided filter
The number of sessions for the project(s) that matched the provided filter
The number of times the intent was used in the project(s) that matched the provided filter
The number of times the slot was used in the project(s) that matched the provided filter
The total number of messages spoken to the project(s) that matched the filter
The number of not understood messages spoken to the project(s) that matched the filter
The number of unique users that have interacted with the project(s) that matched the provided filter

401.description: The provided authentication token does not have permissions for some of the requested resources

201.description: One or more transcripts were successfully queued for evaluation. A warning will be returned if the per-project queue limit was exceeded including details of all skipped transcripts.

transcriptCount.description: The total number of transcripts queued for one or more evaluation.

evaluationCount.description: The total number of evaluations queued across all transcripts.

warning.description: Returned when the per-project quota for queuing evaluations has been exceeded.

429.description: No evaluations could be queued because the limit has been exceeded for this project. Retry after waiting for the time indicated in the response.

post.summary: Run an Evaluation for a Transcript

auth.name: authorization
auth.description: Voiceflow Dialog Manager API key (VF.DM) or Workspace API key (VF.WS)
